title: Figure 1 from: Biwersi M, Xu M, Heiðmarsson S, Pálsson S, Sorensen JL, Ólafsdóttir ES (2026) Mycobiont-specific primers for lichenized fungal genus Cladonia (Cladoniaceae, Ascomycota). MycoKeys 127: 1-23. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.127.167091
author: Biwersi, Maia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1 Sequence alignments at primer binding locations. Numbering of nucleotide sites was determined using reference sequences from various fungal taxa. Alignments used for primer design are provided in Suppl. materials 1–4, including representative sequences from major Cladonia (sub)clades (Stenroos et al. 2019) and previously published primers.
steps_raw: Figure 1 Sequence alignments at primer binding locations. Numbering of nucleotide sites was determined using reference sequences from various fungal taxa. Alignments used for primer design are provided in Suppl. materials 1–4, including representative sequences from major Cladonia (sub)clades (Stenroos et al. 2019) and previously published primers.
